Title: website
Description: Personal portfolio built with React + Vite and Mantine; showcases projects, experience, and technologies. Responsive, bilingual (EN/ES), deployed on Netlify.

Title: GreenChoiceAI
Authors: Mario Gutiérrez, Jorge Martínez, Jose María Martín, Inés García
Description: GreenChoiceAI routes questions to the most cost-efficient LLM based on predicted category and heuristic difficulty. Backend (FastAPI) computes difficulty, predicts category with sentence embeddings + SVM, selects a model using performance CSV, and returns concise LLM answers; frontend is a Vite+React chat UI.

Title: Brainzzz
Description: High-performance AI trivia engine built with React. Features real-time question synthesis from Wikipedia via Groq API, adaptive difficulty scaling, and a hybrid ELO-time rating system. Master general culture through an addictive, competitive, and data-driven experience.

Title: data-orchestrator
Authors: Mario Gutiérrez, Jose María Martín, Juan Pérez, Sergio González
Description: Data Orchestrator automates the ingestion of taxi data from a CSV into MongoDB (backup) and Elasticsearch (primary). It integrates a Rasa chatbot that answers questions by distinguishing between common ones (responses taken from a CSV) and uncommon ones (direct queries to Elasticsearch), and provides a Flask-based web interface.

Title: face-recognition-stream
Description: A real-time face recognition and tracking web application using Flask, OpenCV, facenet-pytorch, and DeepSort. Stream video from your laptop or mobile, recognize faces, and train new identities via a web interface.

Title: dudasETSIT
Description: A Flask web app for managing and discussing issues within a student group, featuring user authentication, voting, and message-based discussions.

Title: Metodología para la caracterización y modelado de la propagación de riesgos de ciberseguridad
Authors: Mario Gutiérrez, Carmen Sánchez-Zas, Sonia Solera-Cotanilla, Xavier Larriva-Novo, Víctor A. Villagrá
Description: La creciente interconectividad de los sistemas digitales ha incrementado la complejidad y el alcance de los riesgos de ciberseguridad, favoreciendo su propagación a través de infraestructuras y organizaciones interdependientes. Esta propuesta analiza la propagación de los riesgos de ciberseguridad desde la llegada de una amenaza a un sistema, evaluando las relaciones entre activos y modelando un conjunto de reglas de propagación. Se propone un sistema que permite modelar los mecanismos de transmisión del riesgo y capturar efectos en cascada derivados de dependencias entre activos y su relevancia dentro del marco de riesgos de ciberseguridad. Este enfoque dinámico facilita la identificación de puntos críticos y la evaluación de escenarios.
Tags: Cybersecurity, Cybersecurity:Risk Assessment, Cybersecurity: Risk Propagation
